positive: A stylized, highly contrasted minimal illustration of a stylized mountain range silhouette at sunset. The mountains should feature clean, flowing lines and sharp peaks. Include geometric elements like sunburst patterns and minimalist constellations filling the sky space. The color palette must be limited to deep indigo blue, burnt orange, and cream white for maximum print contrast. Composition should be perfectly centered and scalable, suitable for chest placement on apparel. Vector art style, flat graphic design, high contrast, clean lines, maximal readability.
